comment: Great base for our walleye trip. Dock was perfect for loading the boat at dawn.
Dan, Ryan and I had a solid weekend. Fish cleaning station out back was a nice touch.
Close to the ramp, quiet at night. We were on the water by 6am every day.
Good spot for a fishing crew. Plenty of room for gear and coolers.
Host left tips on where the perch were biting. Caught our limit.
Clean, simple, exactly what three guys need for a fishing weekend.
Parking for the truck and trailer was easy. Would book again next fall.
Solid Lake Erie cabin. Walleye were running and the cottage was warm.
Ryan and I split this one. Short drive to the marina, no complaints.
Comfortable beds after a long day on the water. Great location.
Dock lights helped us get the boat squared away after dark.
Right on the bay. Watched the sunrise then went after the walleye.
